children.heading: Imposition of tax
children.label: a Imposition of tax
children.text: There is hereby imposed on any person who receives greenmail a tax equal to 50 percent of gain or other income of such person by reason of such receipt.
such shareholder held such stock (as determined under section 1223) for less than 2 years before entering into the agreement to make the transfer,

children.label: B
children.text: any person acting in concert with such shareholder, or

children.label: C
children.text: any person who is related to such shareholder or person described in subparagraph (B),
such acquisition is pursuant to an offer which was not made on the same terms to all shareholders.

children.heading: Public tender offer
children.label: 1 Public tender offer
children.text: The term “public tender offer” means any offer to purchase or otherwise acquire stock or assets in a corporation if such offer was or would be required to be filed or registered with any Federal or State agency regulating securities.

children.heading: Related person
children.label: 2 Related person
children.text: A person is related to another person if the relationship between such persons would result in the disallowance of losses under section 267 or 707(b).

children.heading: Tax applies whether or not amount recognized
children.label: d Tax applies whether or not amount recognized
children.text: The tax imposed by this section shall apply whether or not the gain or other income referred to in subsection (a) is recognized.

children.heading: Administrative provisions
children.label: e Administrative provisions
children.text: For purposes of the deficiency procedures of subtitle F, any tax imposed by this section shall be treated as a tax imposed by subtitle A.
